content:
Hi!

I followed the quick start here:
https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/blob/rust/Documentation/rust/quick-start.rst

I noticed that .config has CONFIG_RUST=y, but it doesn't have CONFIG_HAS_RUST as can be found here:
https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/blob/rust/.github/workflows/kernel-x86_64-debug-thinlto.config
HAS_RUST is called RUST_IS_AVAILABLE now, and the overall logic works a bit differently -- do not worry about it!
